//! This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
//! Structure: KeyLength
 #![allow(non_camel_case_types)]
 #![allow(unused_parens)]
 #![allow(missing_docs)]
 #![allow(unused_imports)]
 #![allow(unused_variables)]
 #![allow(unused_unsafe)]
 use std::ptr;

pub struct fastdata;
fn ToLowerAscii(value: u8) -> u8 {
    if value >= b'A' && value <= b'Z' {
        value + 32
    } else {
        value
    }
}

fn GetFirstChar(value: &str) -> u8 { value.as_bytes()[0] }
fn GetFirstCharLower(value: &str) -> u8 { ToLowerAscii(GetFirstChar(value)) }
fn GetLastChar(value: &str) -> u8 {
    let bytes = value.as_bytes();
    bytes[bytes.len() - 1]
}
fn GetLastCharLower(value: &str) -> u8 { ToLowerAscii(GetLastChar(value)) }
fn GetLength(value: &str) -> u32 { value.len() as u32 }

fn StartsWith(prefix: &str, value: &str) -> bool { value.starts_with(prefix) }
fn StartsWithIgnoreCase(prefix: &str, value: &str) -> bool {
    let prefix_bytes = prefix.as_bytes();
    let value_bytes = value.as_bytes();

    if value_bytes.len() < prefix_bytes.len() {
        return false;
    }

    for i in 0..prefix_bytes.len() {
        if ToLowerAscii(value_bytes[i]) != ToLowerAscii(prefix_bytes[i]) {
            return false;
        }
    }

    true
}

fn EndsWith(suffix: &str, value: &str) -> bool { value.ends_with(suffix) }
fn EndsWithIgnoreCase(suffix: &str, value: &str) -> bool {
    let suffix_bytes = suffix.as_bytes();
    let value_bytes = value.as_bytes();

    if value_bytes.len() < suffix_bytes.len() {
        return false;
    }

    let start = value_bytes.len() - suffix_bytes.len();
    for i in 0..suffix_bytes.len() {
        if ToLowerAscii(value_bytes[start + i]) != ToLowerAscii(suffix_bytes[i]) {
            return false;
        }
    }

    true
}

pub struct Person {
    pub age: i32,
    pub name: &'static str,
    pub other: Option<&'static Person>,

}

impl Person {
    pub const fn new(age: i32, name: &'static str, other: Option<&'static Person>) -> Self { Self { age, name, other } }
}

impl fastdata {
    const VALUES: [&'static Person; 3] = [
        &Person::new(1, "Bob", Some(&Person::new(4, "Anna", None))), &Person::new(2, "Billy", None), &Person::new(3, "Bibi", None)
    ];

    const OFFSETS: [i32; 3] = [
        0, 1, 2
    ];

    const KEYS: [&'static str; 3] = [
        "a", "aa", "aaa"
    ];

    #[must_use]
    pub fn contains(key: &'static str) -> bool {
        let mut getLength: u32;
        getLength = GetLength(key);
        if ((getLength < 1))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if ((getLength > 3))
        {
         return false;
        }



        let idx = key.len() - 1;
        return key == Self::KEYS[idx];
    }

    #[must_use]
    pub fn try_lookup(key: &'static str) -> Option<&'static Person> {
        let mut getLength: u32;
        getLength = GetLength(key);
        if ((getLength < 1))
        {
         return None;
        }

        if ((getLength > 3))
        {
         return None;
        }



        let idx = key.len() - 1;
        if (key == Self::KEYS[idx]) {
            return Some(Self::VALUES[Self::OFFSETS[idx] as usize]);
        }
        None
    }

    pub const ITEM_COUNT: usize = 3;
    pub const MIN_KEY_LENGTH: usize = 1;
    pub const MAX_KEY_LENGTH: usize = 3;
    pub const HAS_NUMBER: bool = false;
    pub const HAS_UPPERCASE: bool = false;
    pub const HAS_LOWERCASE: bool = true;
    pub const HAS_SYMBOL: bool = false;
    pub const HAS_WHITESPACE: bool = false;
}
